title: GASTAT Annual Fisheries Production Statistics — Red Sea Governorates
abstract: National fisheries production statistics for Red Sea coastal governorates published by the General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT), covering annual landings by species group, gear type, and port of landing.

variables.name: landings_tonnes
variables.label: Total Landings
variables.description: Annual reported fish landings by species group and governorate.

variables.name: aquaculture_output_tonnes
variables.label: Aquaculture Production
variables.description: Farmed fish and shrimp production reported by licensed aquaculture facilities.

variables.name: vessel_count
variables.label: Registered Fishing Vessels
variables.description: Number of licensed fishing vessels active in the governorate for the reporting year.

access.how_to_request: Published openly on the GASTAT open data portal; no request required.

provenance.originator: General Authority for Statistics (GASTAT), Saudi Arabia
provenance.citation: GASTAT. 2026. Fisheries Production Bulletin, Red Sea Governorates 2000-2025. Riyadh: General Authority for Statistics.

known_issues: Species-group categories changed in 2015, complicating pre/post trend comparisons.
